## Plugin reference

- Description: Named agent definitions that launch conversations. Named agent definitions that launch conversations.
- Web:
  - Slots: `Agents.List`, `Agents.ListActions`, `Agents.View`, `Agents.AgentActions`, `Agents.SystemAgent`
